creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #5)
because go 1.22 did a change that the language behaviour more in a way that is expected:
https://go.dev/doc/go1.22
This cause already major problem for many go project.
I think one of the biggest problem for the letsencrypt project were that they needed to revoke thousends of certificates as a for loop was not behaving like expected.
It is faster then and some other nice improvements.
Just give it a try ;)
